session:
version: 0.3.10
name: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-maxscale
predecessor: null
images:
- name: maxscale-image
  injection_files:
  - path: /protected_do_not_change_encrypted_dir/passwd
    content: |
      \admin:$$SCONE::MAXSCALE_SCONE_INJECTED_ADMIN_PASSWORD:hex$$
  - path: /etc/maxscale.cnf
    content: "[maxscale]\nthreads=auto\nlog_debug=true\n# enforce admin host and auth config.\nadmin_host=0.0.0.0\nadmin_auth=true\n\n# load only from binary-fs\nlibdir=/usr/local/lib64/maxscale \n\n# Fixed dir to be configured in the security policy\n# and encrypted used with FSPF. These directories\n# hold temp info that may leak confidential data.\n# Because they are checked by maxscale, we have to\n# keep out of the binary-fs.\nlogdir=/protected_do_not_change_encrypted_dir\ndatadir=/protected_do_not_change_encrypted_dir\ncachedir=/protected_do_not_change_encrypted_dir\npiddir=/protected_do_not_change_encrypted_dir\nexecdir=/protected_do_not_change_encrypted_dir\nconnector_plugindir=/protected_do_not_change_encrypted_dir\npersistdir=/protected_do_not_change_encrypted_dir\nmodule_configdir=/protected_do_not_change_encrypted_dir\nsharedir=/protected_do_not_change_encrypted_dir\nlanguage=/protected_do_not_change_encrypted_dir\n\n[mdb1]\ntype=server\naddress=osv-scanner-sample-mariadb-primary-service\nport=3306\nprotocol=MariaDBBackend\n\n[mdb2]\ntype=server\naddress=osv-scanner-sample-mariadb-replica-service\nport=3307\nprotocol=MariaDBBackend\n\n[mariadbmon]\ntype=monitor\nmodule=mariadbmon\nservers=mdb1,mdb2\nuser=root\npassword=$$SCONE::MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD:hex$$\nmonitor_interval=2s\nauto_failover=true\nauto_rejoin=true\nenforce_simple_topology=true\nenforce_read_only_slaves=true\nreplication_user=replica\nreplication_password=$$SCONE::REPLICATION_USER_PASSWORD:hex$$\nmaster_failure_timeout=4s\nfailcount=3\n\n[rwsplit]\ntype=service\nenable_root_user=true\nrouter=readwritesplit\nservers=mdb1,mdb2\nuser=root\npassword=$$SCONE::MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD:hex$$\ntransaction_replay=false\ncausal_reads=global\n\n[Splitter-Listener]\ntype=listener\nservice=rwsplit\nprotocol=MariaDBClient\nport=3306\nssl=true\nssl_cert=/etc/maxscale/ssl/server.crt\nssl_key=/etc/maxscale/ssl/server.key\nssl_ca_cert=/etc/maxscale/ssl/ca.crt\n"
  - path: /etc/maxscale/ssl/server.crt
    content: $$SCONE::maxscale-frontend-cert$$
  - path: /etc/maxscale/ssl/server.key
    content: $$SCONE::maxscale-frontend-cert:privatekey$$
  - path: /etc/maxscale/ssl/ca.crt
    content: $$SCONE::MARIADB_CA_CERT$$
  volumes:
  - name: protected_do_not_change_encrypted_volume
    path: /protected_do_not_change_encrypted_dir
    update_policy: no_rollback_protection
secrets:
- name: MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD
  import:
    session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-certificates
    secret: MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD
- name: REPLICATION_USER_PASSWORD
  import:
    session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-certificates
    secret: REPLICATION_USER_PASSWORD
- name: MAXSCALE_SCONE_INJECTED_ADMIN_PASSWORD
  import:
    session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-certificates
    secret: MAXSCALE_SCONE_INJECTED_ADMIN_PASSWORD
- name: maxscale-frontend-key
  import:
    session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-certificates
    secret: maxscale-frontend-key
- name: maxscale-frontend-cert
  import:
    session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-certificates
    secret: maxscale-frontend-cert
- name: maxscale-internal-key
  import:
    session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-certificates
    secret: maxscale-internal-key
- name: maxscale-internal-cert
  import:
    session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-certificates
    secret: maxscale-internal-cert
- name: MARIADB_CA_CERT
  import:
    session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-certificates
    secret: MARIADB_CA_CERT
services:
- name: maxscale
  image_name: maxscale-image
  mrenclaves:
  - 72f01c4d6056a6b653d6e5e347b540d17a770f678710144e85cb2eedbc23478a
  environment:
    SCONE_LOG: debug
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD: protected
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_CLIENT_PRIMARY: protected
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_CLIENT_PRIMARY_DESTINATION: TCP:osv-scanner-sample-mariadb-primary-service:3306
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_CLIENT_PRIMARY_DESTINATION_IP: '*'
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_CLIENT_PRIMARY_IDENTITY: $$SCONE::maxscale-internal-cert$$$$SCONE::maxscale-internal-cert:privatekey$$
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_CLIENT_PRIMARY_SERVER_AUTH: $$SCONE::MARIADB_CA_CERT$$
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_CLIENT_REPLICA: protected
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_CLIENT_REPLICA_DESTINATION: TCP:osv-scanner-sample-mariadb-replica-service:3307
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_CLIENT_REPLICA_DESTINATION_IP: '*'
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_CLIENT_REPLICA_IDENTITY: $$SCONE::maxscale-internal-cert$$$$SCONE::maxscale-internal-cert:privatekey$$
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_CLIENT_REPLICA_SERVER_AUTH: $$SCONE::MARIADB_CA_CERT$$
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_SERVER_ADM: protected
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_SERVER_ADM_CLIENT_AUTH: $$SCONE::MARIADB_CA_CERT$$
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_SERVER_ADM_IDENTITY: $$SCONE::maxscale-internal-cert$$$$SCONE::maxscale-internal-cert:privatekey$$
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_SERVER_ADM_PORT: TCP:8989
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_SERVER_TCP: unprotected
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_SERVER_TCP_PORT: TCP:3306
    SCONE_NETWORK_SHIELD_UNSUPPORTED_PROTOCOLS: unprotected
    SCONE_SYNC_FSPF_TAG_WITH_CAS: '0'
  command:
  - maxscale
  - -d
  - -f
  - /etc/maxscale.cnf
  - -l
  - stdout
  pwd: /
  persistency: None
volumes:
- name: protected_do_not_change_encrypted_volume
access_policy:
  read:
  - ANY
  update:
  - CREATOR
security:
  attestation:
    mode: hardware
    tolerate:
    - debug-mode
    - hyperthreading
    - outdated-tcb
    - insecure-configuration
    - software-hardening-needed
    ignore_advisories: '*'
creator:
  signer: |
    -----BEGIN PUBLIC KEY-----
    MCowBQYDK2VwAyEAcKtAFLOMRitgqlXJgLRvctwmDlY+xowL6ed9nQDHbc8=
    -----END PUBLIC KEY-----
